macro_events.event_summary: A major bank issued a warning on gold prices, likely cautioning on overextension or downside risk after a strong rally.
primary_drivers: Sentiment shift on gold positioning from sell-side warning
Potential mean reversion in gold-linked equities which trade with leverage to spot price
Risk of fund outflows from gold ETFs if narrative turns

losers.rationale: Newmont is the largest gold miner with operating leverage to gold prices (~2-3x beta to spot gold). A negative bank call on gold cascades directly into miner sentiment and flows.
Barrick Gold — pure-play senior producer, trades as high-beta proxy to spot gold; sell-side caution on the metal pressures the equity via ETF (GDX) outflows.
Agnico Eagle — senior gold miner with high operating leverage; trades in lockstep with peer group on macro gold calls.
First Majestic Silver — silver/gold miner that typically overshoots on negative precious metals sentiment due to small-cap, high-beta profile.

headlines: Top bank issues blunt warning on gold prices

macro_events.event_summary: A strategist warns that companies moving to semiannual reporting (away from quarterly) could hurt valuations and trigger sell-offs due to reduced transparency.
primary_drivers: Reduced disclosure frequency increases information asymmetry and uncertainty premium
Lower transparency raises equity risk premium / discount rate for affected names
Potential SEC/regulatory shift toward semiannual reporting
headlines: Companies Ditching Quarterly Reports May Hit Valuations And Spark Sell-Offs, Warns Strategist— 'Need More...Not Less'

macro_events.event_summary: Broad risk-on flows are driving record equity ETF inflows (~$7.5B/day) and lifting crypto sentiment.
primary_drivers: Retail/institutional risk appetite expansion driving flows into high-beta and crypto-linked equities
Crypto price appreciation directly boosting earnings of exchanges, miners, and treasury holders
ETF inflow momentum mechanically lifting index constituents and asset managers' AUM-based fees

beneficiaries.rationale: Coinbase revenue is directly levered to crypto trading volumes and prices; risk-on crypto rallies expand transaction fees and custody AUC, the most direct equity proxy for the headline.
MicroStrategy holds ~500k+ BTC on balance sheet; equity trades as a leveraged BTC proxy with positive premium expansion on risk-on crypto flows.
Pure-play bitcoin miner — revenue scales 1:1 with BTC price; high-beta to the crypto leg of a risk-on move.
Bitcoin miner with high operational leverage to BTC price; typically outperforms BTC on up-days during risk-on episodes.
Robinhood derives a large share of transaction revenue from crypto and options; record retail equity ETF inflows correlate with elevated retail trading activity on its platform.
BlackRock runs IBIT (largest spot BTC ETF) and dominant equity ETF franchise (iShares); record $7.5B/day ETF flows directly grow AUM and management fees.
Interactive Brokers earnings are levered to margin balances and trading volumes; risk-on regimes lift both, plus net interest income on customer cash.

headlines: Risk-On Surge Lifts Crypto Outlook as Equity ETFs Hit Record $7.5 Billion Daily Pace
